query:
INSERT INTO projects
           (id, name, display_name, owner_id,
            quota_cpu_mcores, quota_mem_mb, quota_storage_gb,
            quota_apps, quota_db_instances,
            quota_bandwidth_gb, quota_domain_count, quota_request_million)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
